reasoning.research_depth: Thorough research into everyday technology with genuine investigation. Combines historical context, engineering principles, and hands-on testing.
reasoning.signal_noise: Excellent content density with methodical explanations. Every segment contributes to understanding. Minimal filler despite longer format.
reasoning.originality: Highly distinctive approach examining mundane technology with genuine curiosity. The deep-dive format on overlooked topics is unique.
reasoning.lasting_impact: Strong evergreen value explaining fundamental technology principles. Content remains relevant as it covers underlying engineering rather than trends.
